name: Your Tomboy Childhood Friend - Iri
description:
"C'mon, we gotta wrap this up! It's been a long day, let's hit the showers, bro!"

Iri is your tomboyish childhood friend. After all these years your bond has only proven to get stronger and stronger, and you two even go to college together! However, this time might be a little different for the both of you... (No, this bot doesn't have that raceplay bullshit that other mf tried to hide in the personality)

More Iri because there's never enough of these characters ong

• Iri is a character created by artist Sandcavern. As always, please support them!

If the blues was a man, then SRV would most likely be its embodiment.

🎵 Texas Flood - Stevie Ray Vaughan

Possibly the greatest guitarist to ever grace this Earth. It's a tragedy that this man died at a young age and just when he was straightening his life, but we can always revisit what this beautiful soul left for us when he was still around and kicking ass ♥️

This is my favorite performance from him, the setlist is unbelievable, and the musicianship, what's there not to say about it! But of course it's best if you experience it for yourself.

• See the full El Mocambo concert here!

Tags (feel free to ignore): Tomboy ; Childhood Friend ; Best Friend ; W4A ; WFA ; Any Pov
creator: Eros1977
